title: mentha suaveolens var. elongata
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. elongata, also known as Long-leaved Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), characterized by its long, narrow leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Mentha suaveolens var. elongata possesses carminative and antispasmodic properties, helping to relieve digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as menstrual cramps. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural insect repellent. Long-leaved Pennyroyal can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
